title: Lentil Stew Italian Style
description: A hearty Italian-inspired lentil stew made with reduced red wine, fresh herbs, and a hint of Algerian spices. Serve over a bed of steaming hot rice or with a side of crusty bread.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion, carrots, and celery and cook until the vegetables are tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the Algerian spice blend and cook for 1 minute.
Add the lentils, reduced red wine, tomato paste, and thyme. Stir to combine.
Add the water and bring the mixture to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 30-40 minutes, or until the lentils are tender.
Season the stew with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve the stew hot, garnished with fresh parsley or thyme, if desired.
